# Vendored GIFSKI WASM

This directory contains the minimal browser runtime from `gifski-wasm@2.2.0`.

Source package:
https://www.npmjs.com/package/gifski-wasm

Vendored files:
- `dist/encode.js`
- `pkg/gifski_wasm.js`
- `pkg/gifski_wasm_bg.wasm`
- `LICENSE`
- `package.json`

To update, replace these files from the same paths in a newer `gifski-wasm` package version, then update `NOTICE.md` and the version references in this README.
